choices.text: CoinJoin: multiple users combine UTXOs in single tx. Multiple inputs → multiple equal outputs. Breaks common-input heuristic (chain analysis assumes all inputs same owner). Wasabi Wallet, JoinMarket implementations.

Risky: Tornado Cash sanctioned 2022, Blender.io / ChipMixer seized, Samourai Whirlpool devs arrested 2024. Use of sanctioned mixers can freeze funds + legal liability. Prefer non-custodial CoinJoin alternatives.
